title: Simple PVP Pack
description: This Ressource Pack change the textures of your game to make them simpler!
body:
Simple PvP Pack: Performance Meets Simplicity

Simple PvP Pack is a resource pack built for players who prioritize performance and competitive edge. By removing unnecessary visual noise, it provides a clean environment that lets you focus entirely on your opponent.
Key Features:

   - 🎨 Revamped Wool: Wool blocks now feature vibrant colors and distinct borders, making them easier to identify and count during fast-paced BedWars or SkyWars matches.

   - ⚔️ PvP Focused: Streamlined textures designed to enhance combat clarity and reduce visual distractions.

   - 🍎 Clean UI: A minimalist user interface that keeps your screen clear and your focus sharp.

   - ⚡ FPS Friendly: Optimized textures help maintain high frame rates, ensuring a lag-free competitive experience.

Elevate your game with a professional, clean look that puts performance first!
